title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: General

Foreigner Procedures
Procedures and Procedures
Extension of short-term stay
To extend, exceptionally, the stay of foreign persons who have entered Spain for purposes other than their residence, work or long term stay.

title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Requirements and conditions (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

Those who are in Spain in one of the following cases will be in a situation of short stay:
The person who holds a short-stay visa, during its period of validity.
Anyone who is in Spain for an expected stay of a duration not exceeding ninety calendar days within any period of one hundred and eighty calendar days and is not subject to the visa requirement as established by European Union law.
Who, exceptionally, has been authorized to stay in Spanish territory for a duration not exceeding ninety calendar days within any period of one hundred and eighty calendar days under the terms of article 51 of RD 1155/2024, of November 19.

title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Classes and typologies

Extension of stay without a visa.
Extension of the short-stay visa.

title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Who are the stakeholders?

Foreign persons who have entered Spain for purposes other than their residence, work or long-term stay.

title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Duration of the extension

In the case of
entry with visa
, when the duration of the visa is less than three months, the stay may be extended, which in no case may be more than three months in a period of six.
In the event of
entry without a visa
, when exceptional circumstances so warrant, the stay of a foreigner foreigner in Spanish territory may be authorized beyond three months.

title: Extension of short-term stay
section_title: How to carry out the procedure (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: How to carry out the procedure (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

Face-to-face
Go (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
Model of request extension of stay. (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
Rate model 790, code 012. (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
The application, together with the documentation that must accompany it, must be submitted to the Superior Headquarters or
Police Station (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/dependencias_localizador.php)
of the province where the foreign person is going to stay and will be issued in the competent units determined by the General Directorate of Police

title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Documentation (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

Documents for the visa extension
Model of request extension of stay. (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
Proof of payment Tax model 790 Code 012. (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
Ordinary passport or travel document, valid longer than the length of stay requested, which will be recorded in the file and returned to the interested party.
Accreditation of the reasons given for the application, which must be exceptional, in the case of nationals of States that do not require a visa for entry into Spain and of a humanitarian nature, force majeure or serious personal reasons in the case of nationals of States that do require a visa for entry into Spain.
Sufficient proof that it has adequate financial means for the extension time requested, in the

title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Documentation (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

sa for entry into Spain.
Sufficient proof that it has adequate financial means for the extension time requested, in the terms established in title I, Regime of entry and exit from Spanish territory, of RD 1155/2024, of 19 November.
Travel assistance insurance with the same coverage as that required for the application of the short-stay visa, and with a validity equal to or greater than the extension requested.
Guarantees of return to the country of origin or, where appropriate, of admission to the third State of destination, prior to the date of completion of the extension requested. The contribution of a ticket purchased in the name of the applicant with a closed date of return prior to the end of the period of extension of stay requested may serve as evidence of this circumstance.

title: Extension of short-term stay
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Information (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

Basic data of the procedure:
Resolution of the procedure:

title: Extension of short-term stay
section_title: Bodies competent to resolve this procedure:
text:
Title: Extension of short-term stay
Section: Bodies competent to resolve this procedure:

The extension of stay may be granted by the Sub-Delegates of the Government, by the Government Delegates in the Uniprovincial Autonomous Communities, and by the General Commissioner for Foreigners and Borders of the General Directorate of the Police, after a report from the Superior Headquarters or Police Station.
The resolution of the procedure does put an end to the administrative route.
Effect of the lack of resolution in this period: Dismissal (initiation at the request of the interested party).

ORGANIC LAW 4/2000 of 11 January, on the rights and freedoms of foreigners and their social integration.

text:

Contentious Court - Administrative.
Central Administrative Litigation Courts; Administrative Litigation Chambers of the High Court of Justice.
Administrative Litigation Division of the National High Court; Administrative Litigation Division of the Supreme Court.
Period for lodging an appeal: 2 months.

title: Student Card for Foreigners
text:
Title: Student Card for Foreigners
Section: General

Foreigner Procedures
Procedures and Procedures
Student Card for Foreigners
Document intended to identify the foreigner for the purpose of proving his legal status in Spain.

title: Student Card for Foreigners
text:
Title: Student Card for Foreigners
Section: Who are the stakeholders?

Foreigner student with permission to stay longer than six months.

title: Student Card for Foreigners
text:
Title: Student Card for Foreigners
Section: Period of validity

It will have the same period of validity as the authorization or recognition of the right that justifies its issuance, and will lose its validity when that of the aforementioned authorization occurs, for any of the reasons established by regulations for this purpose or, where appropriate, for the loss of the right to remain in Spanish territory.

title: Student Card for Foreigners
section_title: Bodies competent to resolve this procedure:
text:
Title: Student Card for Foreigners
Section: Bodies competent to resolve this procedure:

The General Directorate of Police, in accordance with the coordination criteria established by the State Secretariat for Security, in agreement with the State Secretariat for Immigration and Emigration, shall be responsible for the organization and management of the services for issuing Foreigner Identity Cards.
The resolution of the procedure does put an end to the administrative route.
Effect of the lack of resolution in this period: Dismissal (initiation at the request of the interested party).

title: Assignment of NIE at the request of interested party
text:
Title: Assignment of NIE at the request of interested party
Section: General

Foreigner Procedures
Procedures and Procedures
Assignment of NIE at the request of interested party
Allocation of NIE for foreigners who are related to Spain due to their economic, professional or social interests.
Foreigners who are related to Spain by reason of their economic, professional or social interests, must be interested in the assignment of the Foreigner Identity Number to the General Directorate of the Police.

title: Assignment of NIE at the request of interested party
text:
Title: Assignment of NIE at the request of interested party
Section: Requirements and conditions (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

That you are not in an irregular situation in Spain.
The reasons for requesting the allocation of this number should be communicated.
The procedure must be resolved within a
maximum period of five days
from the entry of the application in the register of the competent body for processing. The decision must be notified within that period,
after which no response has been obtained, it will be understood that the request has been rejected
.

title: Assignment of NIE at the request of interested party
section_title: How to carry out the procedure (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
text:
Title: Assignment of NIE at the request of interested party
Section: How to carry out the procedure (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

Face-to-face
Go (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)
At the request of the interested party
The General Directorate of Police is requested, directly or through the
Immigration Offices Opens a new window. External link. (https://www.mptfp.gob.es/portal/delegaciones_gobierno/extranjeria/extranjeria_ddgg.html)
or
Police Stations (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/dependencias_localizador.php)
. In the event that the foreigner is not in Spanish territory at the time of the application, he will request the allocation of NIE to the General Commissariat of Foreigners and Borders, through the Spanish Consular Offices abroad.

title: Registration certificate
text:
Title: Registration certificate
Section: General

Foreigner Procedures
Procedures and Procedures
Registration certificate
It is a printed document that is provided to the foreigner that cannot be documented by the authorities of any country and that wishes to be documented by Spain, once its registration in the Central Register of Foreigners has been resolved.
Printed document, to be renewed annually and the characteristics of which will be determined by the Ministry of the Interior, following a report by the Inter-Ministerial Commission on Foreigners

title: Registration certificate
text:
Title: Registration certificate
Section: Who are the stakeholders?

Foreigner who cannot be documented by the authorities of any country and who wishes to be documented by Spain.

title: Registration certificate
text:
Title: Registration certificate
Section: Period of validity

1 year, renewable.

The application and the accompanying documentation must be submitted to any Foreigner Office or
Police Station (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/dependencias_localizador.php)
.

title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
text:
Title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
Section: General

Foreigner Procedures
Procedures and Procedures
Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
Document intended to identify the foreigner for the purpose of proving his legal status in Spain.

title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
text:
Title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
Section: Classes and typologies

After entering Spain, the foreigner must apply for the Foreigner Identity Card.
When the residence permit is renewed and once the favorable decision has been notified, the foreigner must apply for the Foreigner Identity Card.

title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
text:
Title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
Section: Who are the stakeholders?

Residents in Spain.

title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
text:
Title: Initial card or renewal residence or residence and work
Section: Period of validity

Term of validity of the temporary residence permit.

title: Return authorization
text:
Title: Return authorization
Section: General

Foreigner Procedures
Procedures and Procedures
Return authorization
Document that is issued to the foreign person whose authorization of residence or long-term stay is in a period of renewal or extension. It allows you to leave Spain and return to the national territory within 90 days.

title: Return authorization
text:
Title: Return authorization
Section: Requirements and conditions (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

The foreign person whose authorization of residence or stay is in a period of renewal or extension may be issued a return authorization that allows him to leave Spain and return to the national territory, provided that the applicant certifies that he has begun the procedures of renewal or extension of the title that entitles him to remain in Spain within the legal period established for that purpose.
Likewise, the holder of a foreigner’s identity card in force may request a return authorization in case of theft, loss, destruction or non-use of the card, provided that he certifies that he has submitted a request for duplication of the card.
The return authorization will be valid for no more than ninety days from the expiration of the residence or stay authorization, if requested prior to said expiration.
In the event that it is requested at a time after the expiration of the

title: Return authorization
text:
Title: Return authorization
Section: Requirements and conditions (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

ization, if requested prior to said expiration.
In the event that it is requested at a time after the expiration of the authorization of residence or stay, the authorization of return will be valid no more than ninety days since it is granted.
When the trip responds to a situation of need, the return authorization will be processed on a preferential basis.
When the foreign person certifies that the trip responds to a situation of need and exceptional reasons exist, the return authorization referred to in the previous paragraph may be issued, with a validity of no more than ninety days from the granting of the return authorization, if the initial application for residence authorization or residence authorization has been resolved favourably.
Competent authority
The return authorization will be granted by the Delegate or Subdelegate of the competent Government, by the Commissioner General

title: Return authorization
text:
Title: Return authorization
Section: Requirements and conditions (https://sede.policia.gob.es/portalCiudadano/_ca-valencia/tramites_extranjeria_tramite_asignacion_nie.php)

n authorization will be granted by the Delegate or Subdelegate of the competent Government, by the Commissioner General for Foreigners and Borders or by the persons holding the police stations and border posts of the National Police Force.

title: Return authorization
text:
Title: Return authorization
Section: Period of validity

During the validity of the ninety days of the return authorization
there will be no limitation of entries and exits with a single document
.
Return authorization
In accordance with European Union law, the return authorization
will only be valid for entry through the Spanish authorized border crossing points
.

title: Return authorization
text:
Title: Return authorization
Section: By Own Competition:

Delegate or Subdelegate of the competent Government, the Commissioner General for Foreigners and Borders or the holders of police stations and border posts of National Police
The resolution of the procedure does not put an end to the administrative route.
Effect of the lack of resolution in this period: Dismissal (initiation at the request of the interested party).
